bead.title: Introduce selectable bead Backend interface in cli/internal/bead
bead.description: Refactor cli/internal/bead to expose a Backend interface (per the TD from ddx-6bb51a52) so the existing JSONL+flock+git store becomes one implementation among many. No behavior change yet — JSONL backend remains default. Add a config knob (e.g. .ddx.yml beads.backend or DDX_BEAD_BACKEND env) to select a backend. Existing tests must keep passing unchanged.
bead.acceptance: 1. cli/internal/bead/backend.go defines the Backend interface (CRUD, claim, list/ready/blocked, dep ops, events append, archive split, JSONL export/import). 2. Current JSONL implementation refactored behind the interface; no caller changes outward behavior. 3. Backend selection plumbed via config + env (default jsonl). 4. go test ./cli/... passes. 5. chaos_test.go runs against the JSONL backend through the interface.
